label: 机场

label: Airport
comment: A facility for aircraft takeoff and landing and passenger transport.

label: 接壤
comment: 两个地理实体之间共享边界的关系。

label: Borders
comment: The relationship between two geographical entities sharing a border.

label: 城市

label: City
comment: An administrative area or settlement with a dense population and developed economy.

comment: 城市在本地语言中的通用名称。

label: City Local Name
comment: The common name of a city in its local language.

comment: Other historical or informal names used for a city.

label: 城市人口

label: City Population

label: 大洲
comment: 地球上面积广阔、地理特征独特的陆地区域。

label: Continent
comment: A large, distinct landmass on Earth with unique geographical features.

label: 国家
comment: 具有独立政府、主权和固定领土的政治实体。

label: Country
comment: A sovereign political entity with an independent government and fixed territory.

label: 国家本地名
comment: 国家在本地语言中的正式名称。

label: Country Local Name
comment: The official name of a country in its local language.

label: 国家别名
comment: 国家历史上或非正式使用的其他名称。

label: Country Other Name
comment: Other historical or informal names used for a country.

label: 国家人口
comment: 国家境内的常住人口总数。

label: Country Population

label: 沙漠
comment: 降水稀少、植被稀疏的干旱地区。

label: Desert
comment: A dry area with sparse vegetation and very little precipitation.

label: 经济

label: Economy

label: 包含

comment: A spatial relationship where one entity contains or covers another.

label: 族群

label: Ethnic Group
comment: A group of people sharing a common culture, language, or ancestry.

comment: 描述地理特征的河口类型或属性。

comment: 描述地理特征的岛屿类型或属性。

comment: Lake type or attribute describing geographical features.

comment: 描述地理特征的河流类型或属性。

comment: 描述地理特征的海域类型或属性。

label: 地理源头

label: 岛屿
comment: 被水域包围的陆地区域。

label: Island
comment: A land area surrounded by water.

label: 岛屿位于
comment: 岛屿被包含在另一个地理实体内部的关系。

label: Island In
comment: The relationship where an island is contained within another geographical entity.

label: 是成员
comment: 表示实体属于某个集合或组织的属性。

label: Is Member
comment: An attribute indicating an entity belongs to a specific set or organization.

label: 湖泊
comment: 地表上被陆地包围的积水区域。

label: Lake
comment: An area of standing water surrounded by land.

label: 湖在岛上
comment: 湖泊位于岛屿之上的特殊地理关系。

label: Lake On Island
comment: A special geographical relationship where a lake is located on an island.

label: 语言
comment: 用于交流的具有特定语法和词汇的系统。

label: Language
comment: A system of communication used by a particular community.

label: 位于
comment: 表示实体在空间上处于特定位置的关系。

label: Located
comment: A relationship indicating an entity is spatially located at a specific position.

label: 位于
comment: 表示实体在地理空间上的位置关系。

label: Located On
comment: Indicates the spatial location of an entity.

label: 合并于
comment: 表示两个实体合并为一个整体。

label: Merges With
comment: Indicates that two entities merge into one.

label: 山脉
comment: 由一系列山峰组成的地理特征。

label: Mountain Range
comment: A geographical feature consisting of a chain of peaks.

comment: 位于岛屿上的山脉。

label: Island Mountain
comment: A mountain range located on an island.

label: 组织
comment: 从事商业、政治或社会活动的团体。

label: Organization
comment: A group of people organized for a particular purpose.

label: 政治
comment: 涉及政府、权力和公共事务的领域。

label: Politics
comment: The activities associated with the governance of a country.

label: 人口
comment: 特定区域内的居民数量。

label: Population
comment: The total number of people inhabiting a specific area.

label: 省份
comment: 国家的一级行政区划单位。

label: Province Population

label: 宗教

label: Religion
comment: A system of faith and worship.

label: 河流

label: River On Island

comment: Indicates that a river flows through a specific area.

label: 海域
comment: 海洋的一部分，通常被陆地包围。

label: Sea
comment: A part of an ocean partly enclosed by land.

label: 语言

label: Spoken Language
comment: The language spoken in a specific region or group.

label: 农业
comment: 关于农业生产、作物种植及农业产值的描述。

label: Agriculture
comment: Description regarding agricultural production, crop cultivation, and output.

label: 面积
comment: 指特定地理区域的总占地面积。

label: Area
comment: The total land area covered by a specific geographic region.

label: 首都
comment: 国家的政治中心或主要行政城市。

label: Capital
comment: The political center or primary administrative city of a country.

label: 城市
comment: 人口密集、工商业发达的居民点。

label: City
comment: A large and important town.

label: 代码
comment: 用于标识该实体或数据的唯一编码。

label: Code
comment: A unique code used to identify the entity or data.

label: 大洲
comment: 地球上最大的陆地板块或地理区域。

label: Continent
comment: The largest landmass or geographic region on Earth.

label: 坐标
comment: 表示地理位置的经纬度数值。

label: Coordinates
comment: Numerical values representing geographical location in latitude and longitude.

label: 国家
comment: 拥有独立政府、主权的政治实体。

label: Country
comment: A sovereign state or nation.

label: 国家1
comment: 关系中的第一个国家实体。

label: Country 1
comment: The first country entity in a relationship.

label: 国家2
comment: 关系中的第二个国家实体。

label: Country 2
comment: The second country entity in a relationship.

label: 深度
comment: 指从表面到底部的垂直距离或深度值。

label: Depth
comment: The vertical distance from the surface to the bottom.

label: 沙漠
comment: 指降水稀少、植被稀疏的干旱地区。

label: Desert
comment: A dry region characterized by sparse vegetation and low precipitation.

label: 海拔
comment: 相对于海平面的高度。

label: Elevation
comment: Height above sea level.

label: 国内生产总值
comment: 衡量国家或地区经济规模的核心指标。

label: GDP
comment: A core indicator measuring the economic scale of a country or region.

label: 时区偏移
comment: 相对于格林威治标准时间的时差。

label: GMT Offset
comment: Time difference from Greenwich Mean Time.

label: 高度
comment: 指从基准面（如海平面）到顶部的垂直距离。

label: Height
comment: The vertical distance from a baseline (e.g., sea level) to the top.

label: 机场代码
comment: 国际航空运输协会分配的机场代码。

label: IATA Code
comment: The three-letter code assigned by IATA to an airport.

label: 工业
comment: 关于工业生产、制造业及工业产值的描述。

label: Industry
comment: Description regarding industrial production, manufacturing, and output.

label: 通货膨胀率
comment: 反映物价水平持续上涨的经济指标。

label: Inflation Rate
comment: An economic indicator reflecting the sustained rise in price levels.

label: 岛屿
comment: 被水包围的陆地区域。

label: Island
comment: A piece of land surrounded by water.

label: 岛屿
comment: 被水包围的陆地区域或群岛。

label: Islands
comment: Land areas surrounded by water or an archipelago.

label: 湖泊
comment: 陆地表面相对封闭的天然水域。

label: Lake
comment: A natural body of water surrounded by land.

label: 纬度
comment: 地球表面某点与赤道平面的夹角。

label: Latitude
comment: The angular distance of a place north or south of the earth's equator.

label: 长度
comment: 河流或道路等线性实体的长度。

label: Length
comment: The measurement of the extent of something from end to end.

label: 本地名称
comment: 该地区或实体的官方本地语言名称。

label: Local Name
comment: The official name in the local language of the region or entity.

label: 经度
comment: 地球表面某点与本初子午线的夹角。

label: Longitude
comment: The angular distance of a place east or west of the prime meridian.

label: 山脉
comment: 指一系列相连的山峰或隆起地形。

label: Mountain Range
comment: A series of connected peaks or elevated landforms.

label: 山脉群
comment: 指该地区内存在的山脉集合或地理特征。

label: Mountain Ranges
comment: The collection of mountain ranges or geographical features present in the area.

label: 名称
comment: 实体的标识符或称呼。

label: Name
comment: The identifier or title of an entity.

label: 组织
comment: 指具有共同目标、结构化的团体或机构。

label: Organization
comment: A group of people with a common purpose and structure.

label: 别名
comment: 该地区或实体的非官方或历史名称。

label: Other Name
comment: The unofficial or historical names of the region or entity.

label: 百分比
comment: 表示数量占总量或总数的比率。

label: Percentage
comment: The ratio of a quantity to a total expressed as a percentage.

label: 人口
comment: 指特定区域内的常住居民总数。

label: Population
comment: The total number of permanent residents in a specific area.

label: 河流
comment: 地表流动的天然水道或水体。

label: River
comment: A natural watercourse or body of water flowing on the surface.

label: 海域
comment: 大洋边缘的附属水域或特定海域。

label: Sea
comment: A marginal sea or specific body of water adjacent to an ocean.

comment: 关联的特定海域或水体名称。

label: Sea 1
comment: The name of a related specific sea or water body.

label: 海域2
comment: 关联的另一个特定海域或水体名称。

label: Sea 2

label: 超级语言

label: 类型

label: Type
comment: A classification label used to distinguish entity categories or properties.

label: 失业率

label: Unemployment Rate

label: 年份
